text:
Once upon a time there was a peculiar little bird called Ruby. Ruby could sing melodies that could almost talk sweetly into your ear. She had the saddest little eyes. One day Ruby flew into a rose garden and began to sing.

Ruby sang a little poem—

Once upon a time there…

She sang—

Once upon a time, there was a—

Ruby had a beautiful song that could melt even the hardest hearts.

Ruby flew—

Icy—

Outwardly serene.

Underneath—

Butcheries rustle.

Fluttered—

Ruby fluttered out of the rose—

She had a sweetest song that—

Could weave sweet songs out of nothing—

But—

None could sing quite like Ruby.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
